component.name: PangoTerm
component.summary: Modern SSH client with SFTP, port forwarding, and terminal emulation

description.p: PangoTerm is a modern cross-platform SSH client that combines a powerful terminal emulator with integrated SFTP file management, port forwarding, and session management.

ul.li: Full-featured terminal emulator with multiple tabs
Integrated SFTP file browser with drag-and-drop transfers
Saved connection management and credential storage
Command snippets for frequently used commands
Modern, intuitive interface built for productivity

description.p: Latest stable release with comprehensive analytics, SFTP improvements, and bug fixes.
